narrative:
Harrisville TWP township has 2,996 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.9 percentage points.
